caption: In a clinical or educational setting, a woman wearing a black zip-up jacket and a light-blue surgical mask is seen talking on a cell phone. She holds the phone to her left ear and a white pen in her right hand. Behind her is a computer workstation with a monitor showing a red and white screen and a keyboard on a tray. To her right, a teal-colored water bottle and a white pump bottle sit on a wooden table. Another person, partially visible on the right side of the scene, leans toward the woman. A tripod is positioned in the background. In the bottom left corner, a purple graphic contains the text "Day 1", and in the bottom right corner, a logo displays the text "Sim Week" above "Medical Simulation Week". Across the sequence, the woman remains in the same position, shifting slightly as she continues her phone conversation.
